TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_pila'_(ťĆĘ), title = pila'_(ťĆĘ), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/pila'_(ťĆĘ)} }

S.FORM: == pila' == ťĆĘ ana si kpzyux pila' nya'. ungat ana qutux qu gnalu' nya' squliq ga, ungat zywaw nya'. - .
== pila' == ťĆĘ ana si kpzyux pila' nya'. ungat ana qutux qu gnalu' nya' squliq ga, ungat zywaw nya'. - .
S.PHON: == pila Ē == * ana s~…ēi kpzjux pila Ē nja Ē. uŇčat ana qutux qu …£nalu Ē nja Ē s~…ēquliq …£a, uŇčat zjwaw nja Ē. - .
